definition: Give reasons or evidence in support of a stated position or choice. The position is given; you must defend it.

expected_response.format: Evidence chain that directly supports the stated position; counter-arguments not required
do: Select the strongest, most specific supporting evidence
Link evidence directly to the position
do_not: Give generic descriptions unrelated to the claim

mark_expectation: 1 mark per valid reason or piece of evidence that directly supports the position
question_stem_examples: Justify why Riesling is well suited to the cool climate of the Mosel.
Justify the use of small oak barrels for ageing premium red Burgundy.
mentor_hint: Start by restating the position in one line, then give 3+ specific reasons. Each reason should connect directly to the claim.
